---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce
A minimal code snippet that triggers the issue:

```python
from ragkit import RagKit
# ...
```

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior / error
Paste the full error message / traceback.

## Environment
- RAGKit version: (`python -c "import ragkit; print(ragkit.__version__)"`)
- Python version:
- OS:
- Installed extras: (e.g. `ragkit-vs[embeddings,faiss,ma_rag,groq]`)
- Pipeline / LLM provider:

## Additional context
Anything else that might help.
